notableEvents.label: Will Smith GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Will Smith grounds into a double play, third baseman Josh Jung to first baseman Jake Burger. Shohei Ohtani out at 3rd. Will Smith out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Will Smith rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Will Smith grounds into a double play, third baseman Josh Jung to first baseman Jake Burger. Shohei Ohtani out at 3rd. Will Smith out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas singles on a ground ball to shortstop Corey Seager. Andy Pages to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Santiago Espinal pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Santiago Espinal grounds into a double play, second baseman Josh Smith to shortstop Corey Seager to first baseman Jake Burger. Miguel Rojas out at 2nd. Santiago Espinal out at 1st.
